name: Amethystum Storage Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Amethystum Storage Technology Co., Ltd engages in the research and development, design, production, sale, and service of optical storage media and equipment, and intelligent data hierarchical storage and information technology solutions in China. The company offers data storage and security products, as well as AmeCloud, a enterprise cloud storage solution. Its products and services are applied in government administration, health care, and archives industries to facilitate the national strategies for the big data development and information security. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Meizhou, China.
